zh.lifeSummary: 當Dame Helen of Châtillon-Blois於1323年出生在法國洛易-吉黑布盧瓦時，她的父親Guy I de Blois-Châtillon26歲，母親Marguerite de Valois28歲。她於1343年與Sir Bryan Holme of Paull Holme在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1380年在英國林可爾史爾霍爾梅享年57歲，埋葬在英國林可爾史爾霍爾梅。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Dame Helen of Châtillon-Blois于1323年出生在法国洛易-吉黑布盧瓦时，她的父亲Guy I de Blois-Châtillon26岁，母亲Marguerite de Valois28岁。她于1343年与Sir Bryan Holme of Paull Holme在英国英格兰林可爾史爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1380年在英国林可爾史爾霍爾梅享年57岁，埋葬在英国林可爾史爾霍爾梅。

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Korean Kyong, Kyong Suk, Young, Chae, Chi Young, Hang, Kil, Rin, Sang Hun, Chang, Chong, Insoo, Kum, Sun Young, Yom, Young Hwan.  Cambodian Kiwan, Oeurn, Phoeun, Pich, Saroeuth, Seung, Sophath, Sophea, Yoeun, Phan, Son.  Indian Shanti, Harendra.
Indian (Uttar Pradesh): Brahmin name, from Sanskrit om, the Hindu sacred and mystic syllable uttered at the beginning of prayers.
Cambodian: written ឱម, corresponding to the exclamation of solemn affirmation, of Sanskrit origin (see 1 above), chanted by Buddhist monks.

variants.name: Oum
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Southeast Asian Heang, Hye, Kam, Kan, Kheng, Khin, Kun, Sang, Sok, Phong, Yom, Yoo, Youn, Cuong, Phal, Samnang, Tin.  Cambodian Sokha, Chheang, Choeun, Moeun, Roeun, Sambath, Samoeun, Savuth, Soeun, Sopheap.
Cambodian: written អ៊ុំ, from a Khmer word denoting an elder sibling of one's parent (i.e. ‘uncle’ or ‘aunt’). Compare   Om   3 and   Um   2.

nameMeanings.name: Helen
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: vernacular form of the name (Greek Hēlēnē) borne in classical legend by a famous beauty, wife of Menelaus, whose seizure by the Trojan prince Paris sparked off the Trojan War. Her name is of uncertain origin; it may be connected with a word meaning ‘ray’ or ‘sunbeam’ compare Greek hēlios ‘sun’. It has sometimes been taken as connected with the Greek word meaning ‘Greek’, Hellēn, but this is doubtful. In the early Christian period the name was borne by the mother of the Emperor Constantine, who is now usually known by the Latin version of her name, Helena. She is credited with having found the True Cross in Jerusalem. She was born in about 248 , probably in Bithynia. However, in medieval England it was believed that she had been born in Britain, which greatly increased the popularity of the name there.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Dame Helen of Châtillon-Blois was born in 1323, in Blois, Loir-et-Cher, France, her father, Guy I de Blois-Châtillon, was 26 and her mother, Marguerite de Valois, was 28. She married Sir Bryan Holme of Paull Holme in 1343, in Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1380, in Holme, Lincolnshire, England, at the age of 57, and was buried in Holme, Lincolnshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Dame Helen of Châtillon-Blois est née en 1323, à Blois, Loir-et-Cher, France, son père, Guy I de Blois-Châtillon, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Marguerite de Valois, avait 28 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Bryan Holme of Paull Holme en 1343, à Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée en 1380, à Holme, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 57 ans, et a été enterrée à Holme, Lincolnshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Dame Helen of Châtillon-Blois 1323 in Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Guy I de Blois-Châtillon 26 und ihre Mutter Marguerite de Valois 28. Sie hat 1343 in Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom Sir Bryan Holme of Paull Holme geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb 1380 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Holme, Lincolnshire, England und wurde in Holme, Lincolnshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Dame Helen of Châtillon-Blois è nata il nel 1323 nel Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Francia, sua padre, Guy I de Blois-Châtillon, aveva 26 anni e sua madre, Marguerite de Valois, aveva 28 anni. Lei sposato Sir Bryan Holme of Paull Holme nel 1343, nel Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1380, nel Holme, Lincolnshire, England, all'età di 57 anni, e fu sepolta a Holme, Lincolnshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Dame Helen of Châtillon-Bloisが1323年にフランスロイル-エト-チャーブロイスで生まれた時，父Guy I de Blois-Châtillonは26歳，母Marguerite de Valoisは28歳であった。1343年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアでSir Bryan Holme of Paull Holmeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1380年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアホールメで57歳で死去し，イギリスリンコルンシュアイアホールメにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Dame Helen of Châtillon-Blois(이)가 1323년 프랑스 로이-트-처 블로이스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Guy I de Blois-Châtillon(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Marguerite de Valois(은)는 28세였다. 그녀는 1343년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르에서 Sir Bryan Holme of Paull Holme(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1380년 영국 링코실르 홀에서 57세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 링코실르 홀에 묻혔다.

mn.Paull Holme, Kingston upon Hull, Lincoln: Holme, Lindon, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Dame Helen of Châtillon-Blois nasceu em 1323, em Blois, Loir-et-Cher, França, seu pai, Guy I de Blois-Châtillon, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Marguerite de Valois, tinha 28 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Bryan Holme of Paull Holme em 1343, em Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 1380, em Holme, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, com 57 anos, e foi sepultada em Holme, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Dame Helen of Châtillon-Blois родилась в 1323 г. в местности блоис, лоир-ет-чир, Франция, её отцу по имени Guy I de Blois-Châtillon было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Marguerite de Valois, 28. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Bryan Holme of Paull Holme в 1343 г. в местности линколншир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в 1380 г. в местности холм, линколншир, Англия в возрасте 57 лет и была похоронена в местности холм, линколншир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Dame Helen of Châtillon-Blois nació en 1323, en Blois, Loir-et-Cher, Francia, su papá, Guy I de Blois-Châtillon, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Marguerite de Valois, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Sir Bryan Holme of Paull Holme en 1343, en Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1380, en Holme, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 57 años, y fue sepultada en Holme, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra.
